Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1201
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Tomorrow's a full moon... Not like that means anything anymore, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Man, there's nothing to do. I'm so bored...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I'll go hang out with Ryoji.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I didn't see him at school today, but he was prolly just ditchin', so he should be around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2072 0 0}Oh, wait... Crap, I don't know where he lives...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_1202_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}There will be a full moon tonight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}But we won't be conducting an operation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was thinking I might summon Juno and search around a little just in case, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, by the way, have you seen Aigis, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_1202_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}Hm... Aigis has been coming home late recently...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}I wonder if something happened. I hope she's okay...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1204
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}So, like... what if everything yesterday was all just some crazy dream, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_1205_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 -1 -1 0 0}No, never mind. There's no point in asking such things...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_1205_RE_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4027 0 0}I'm sorry. Forget I said anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_1205_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4034 0 0}No, I don't think "scared" is the right word. I just can't seem to comprehend all that has happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 -1 -1 0 0}I thought I had become stronger after dealing with what happened to my father, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_1206
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry, I was just thinking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I was wondering, if I meet Shinji again someday, what he would say to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_1206_RE_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3031 0 0}I bet he wouldn't say anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}He'd just punch me in the face before either of us has a chance to speak.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}He's got a strong right hook, so I'm sure it'd hurt.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_1206_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, in terms of my own death, I can't always even fully wrap my head around it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's pathetic, isn't it? Especially considering how many times I've had to deal with others'...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_1207
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Why don't... we all try to cheer up a little?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_1207_RE_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sorry, {f 4 1}-kun. I shouldn't be making assumptions...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_1207_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry... I think I'm actually the one who's the most uneasy right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_1209
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}It's already been a week since Ryoji-kun told us everything, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}I couldn't sleep for three days after that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}It... feels weird, being this scared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_1209_RE_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}Yeah... I think I'm only just now realizing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}No one really knows how much they take their lives for granted...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Until they think there's a real possibility they might lose it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_1209_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know... I feel like no one really knows how much they take their lives for granted...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}Until they think there's a real possibility they might lose it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}I don't think anyone can really understand that kind of thing until they actually feel it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_STUDY_1211
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Exams begin next week.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know it's hard to focus, but don't ignore the present because you're worried about the future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}That would just be giving up on life. No point in that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3080 0 0}Personally, I'm going to keep on like always. I'll keep going to Tartarus, and studying too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not leaving the ring without a win.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_STUDY_1212
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, don't forget, it's almost time for exams.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}I've been having a hard time trying to study, though. When I'm alone, my mind wanders...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}...{f 4 1}-kun, do you think maybe we could study together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1213
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Exams start tomorrow, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}I guess this'll be the first time I use an exam to distract me from something else, haha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_1219_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}After I finished my exams...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I walked around town for a little while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Lost are everywhere now... Running into them is no longer just an occasional incident.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Perhaps it has to do with the Fall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_1219_RE_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4097 0 0}I haven't thought about it as much lately, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're the only ones who can save the world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_1219_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We must continue going to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whether our opponent is a Shadow or fate itself, we will need to be strong to win.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_1221
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just ten days until New Year's Eve.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}But, for some reason... I'm actually not scared at all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, maybe I shouldn't say "at all"... But I think I'm okay now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Whether we'd win or lose... I don't know. But I want to know that I did everything I could.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_1223
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are eight more days until New Year's Eve...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 1}-san, do you know what you'll decide yet?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}I was thinking about it a lot, but then I realized there wasn't much to think about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, I can't tell my mom and Aragaki-san that we failed. So... that's that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_1225
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}So today's December 25th.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But all this talk about "death" and "fate"... What a depressing Christmas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Christmas will be better next year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}That's right, I said it—"next year." We're not gonna let the world end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_TARTAROS_1226
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The second term is over... and only five days remain until New Year's Eve.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}To be completely honest, I'm still nervous...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, I am no longer uncertain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4080 0 0}I have made up my mind beyond the shadow of a doubt.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I will fight until the very end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_1227
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Only four more days until New Year's Eve...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}I was really worried for a while, and I wasn't sure what I was going to do...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}I even thought my fear might completely overtake me and I wouldn't be able to decide anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I actually feel strong...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_1228
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}There are just three more days until New Year's Eve.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}Have you decided what you're going to say to Ryoji-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1229
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}The day after tomorrow's the big day. You make up your mind yet?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I made up mine, by the way. Kinda took me a while to get there, though, haha.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}Well, you should make your choice soon, if you haven't. No changin' your mind at the last minute![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_AEGIS_OUT_NA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6017 0 0}Welcome back. It's good to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_YUKARI_IN2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1012 0 0}Oh, you're here? Sorry, guess I missed you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_SANADA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Were you in your room all this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_FUKA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Oh, hello! I didn't realize you were already here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_IKUTSUKI_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14204 0 0}Oh, I didn't know you were already here. As you can see, I've come over for a quick visit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go get it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK_QUEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}エラーメッセージです。[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}杉山まで報告ください。[cr][n]{f 1 1}
